nft.description: Mustaches On Borbs aka M.O.B, were manifested by accident in the NALGOS ALGOCAINE Warehouse. Mostly intelligent beings and striving to be better, their plan is to infiltrate in the Algorand blockchain to expand their territory in the MetaVerse!

nft.name: AlgoDookie1194
nft.creator: BOEAR2VHZUGTAFHJYM7QYWEZLKP6VZHG7JJ2SIXCOMDUZGBNEU73L62VKM
nft.description: AlgoDookies is a seasonal raffle series hosted on Algorand. You buy a cheap AlgoDookie NFT (ticket) and have a chance to win something far more valuable each week. More Dookies = Higher chance to win! Winners will be randomly generated each week and posted on Twitter! 50% of the proceeds will go to the Montreal Childrens hospital. 25% will go to a side pot to assist in the purchasing of new NFTs to be given out as rewards.

nft.name: Digitizer
nft.creator: QPQAARSU64ZUW33J227PJS74GWTMBKJEUU34IL5MBE3542WA7QAHBEW4B4
nft.description: Created using Mandelbulb 3D + Photoshop. This NFT is ARC-19 enabled and is capable of mutability. If you would like this NFT to be remixed, please contact AllSeeingSkye.algo. Ownership rights belong to NFT holder. Artist: Jaye

nft.name: Building for the Future
nft.creator: LX37KJ4DWXV3YT3DVTQXSJGHNX6OMEHCSJG6MV5REVUG4PKTFG7TQXYXRA
nft.description: This NFT commemorates the first purchasers of our token, symbolizing their pivotal role in constructing the future of our community. The image depicts a futuristic space cruiser under construction, representing the early supporters as the builders of an advanced, expansive vision. The intricate details of scaffolding, robotic arms, and unfinished sections mirror the foundational work being done to craft something grand and enduring. Set against a stunning cosmic backdrop of swirling nebulae and a bright star, the image reflects the vast potential ahead. Just like the space cruiser, these early contributors are building the path to progress and innovation, with their efforts laying the groundwork for extraordinary achievements.
